SecurityEvent.description: Windows Security Event Log - logon, process creation, service install, account management, policy changes

splitHints.description: Keep security-critical EventIDs in Analytics: logon (4624/4625/4648), process (4688), service install (7045), account changes (4720-4738), privilege (4672), Kerberoasting (4769), audit log cleared (1102)

SigninLogs.description: Azure AD interactive sign-in logs - authentication events, MFA, conditional access, risk detection

splitHints.description: Keep failed sign-ins, risky sign-ins, and MFA events in Analytics
splitHints.kql: ResultType != 0 or RiskLevelDuringSignIn != "none" or ConditionalAccessStatus == "failure" or AuthenticationRequirement == "multiFactorAuthentication"

AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs.description: Azure AD non-interactive sign-in logs - token refreshes, service-to-service, background auth

splitHints.description: Keep failures and risky sign-ins in Analytics; routine token refreshes to Data Lake

AuditLogs.description: Azure AD audit logs - directory changes, app registrations, role assignments, group changes

splitHints.description: Keep role/group changes, credential changes, and app modifications in Analytics
splitHints.kql: OperationName has_any ("Add member", "Remove member", "Add owner", "Remove owner", "role", "password", "credential", "application", "service principal", "policy", "conditional access")

CommonSecurityLog.description: CEF-formatted logs from firewalls, proxies, IDS/IPS, WAFs, and other network security appliances

splitHints.description: Keep denied/blocked/alert actions and high-severity events in Analytics

Syslog.description: Linux syslog - system events, authentication, daemon logs, cron, kernel messages

splitHints.description: Keep auth, authpriv (login events), kern (kernel), and high-severity messages in Analytics

AzureActivity.description: Azure platform activity log - resource CRUD, RBAC changes, policy events, service health

splitHints.description: Keep write/delete operations and failures in Analytics; read-only success events to Data Lake
splitHints.kql: CategoryValue in ("Administrative", "Security", "Policy") or ActivityStatusValue == "Failed" or OperationNameValue has_any ("delete", "write", "action")

OfficeActivity.description: Office 365 unified audit log - Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams, Power Platform activity

splitHints.description: Keep file sharing, permission changes, mailbox delegation, and external access events in Analytics

DeviceProcessEvents.description: Defender for Endpoint process creation and execution events

splitHints.description: Keep suspicious process patterns in Analytics (LOLBins, scripting engines, unsigned, unusual paths)

DeviceNetworkEvents.description: Defender for Endpoint network connection events

splitHints.description: Keep connections from suspicious processes and uncommon ports in Analytics

DeviceFileEvents.description: Defender for Endpoint file creation, modification, and deletion events

splitHints.description: Keep file events from suspicious processes and in sensitive paths in Analytics
splitHints.kql: ActionType in ("FileCreated", "FileModified") and (FolderPath has_any ("\\System32\\", "\\Startup\\", "\\Tasks\\", "\\Temp\\") or FileName endswith_cs ".exe" or FileName endswith_cs ".dll" or FileName endswith_cs ".ps1" or FileName endswith_cs ".bat" or FileName endswith_cs ".vbs")

DeviceLogonEvents.description: Defender for Endpoint logon and authentication events

splitHints.description: Keep remote logons, failed logons, and admin logons in Analytics
splitHints.kql: ActionType == "LogonFailed" or LogonType in ("RemoteInteractive", "Network", "CachedRemoteInteractive") or IsLocalAdmin == true

AzureDiagnostics.description: Azure resource diagnostic logs - diverse schema varies by resource type (NSG, KeyVault, SQL, etc.)

splitHints.description: Keep failures, Key Vault access, NSG flow denies, and high-severity events in Analytics
splitHints.kql: ResultType == "Failed" or Level == "Error" or Level == "Critical" or Category in ("AuditEvent", "NetworkSecurityGroupEvent", "NetworkSecurityGroupRuleCounter") or OperationName has_any ("SecretGet", "SecretSet", "SecretDelete", "KeyGet", "VaultGet")

W3CIISLog.description: IIS web server access logs - HTTP requests, status codes, response times

splitHints.description: Keep error responses (4xx/5xx) and suspicious request patterns in Analytics

WindowsFirewall.description: Windows Firewall log events - allowed and blocked network connections

splitHints.description: Keep blocked connections and inbound traffic in Analytics
